description: Reorganize trainer button interface: compact primary bar with 5 core buttons (New Pattern, Play Pattern, My Answer, Check Answer, Undo) always visible; all settings (Root, First Note, Note Count, Custom Pattern, Colors, Select Notes, Lower Staff, Note Names, Toggle Labels, interval limits) moved to collapsible settings panel toggled by a Settings button; applies to both Pentatonic Trainer and So La Mi Re Do Trainer
